**mod\_forum\_add\_discussion\_post**  
  

Create new posts into an existing discussion.

  
  
Argumentos  
**postid** (Obrigatório)  
        the post id we are going to reply to (can be the initial discussion post  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int   _//the post id we are going to reply to
                                                (can be the initial discussion post_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[postid\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
postid= int

**subject** (Obrigatório)  
        new post subject  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
string   _//new post subject_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[subject\] => string

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
subject= string

**message** (Obrigatório)  
        new post message (html assumed if messageformat is not provided)  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
string   _//new post message (html assumed if messageformat is not provided)_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[message\] => string

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
message= string

**options** (Padrão para "Array ( ) ")  
        Options  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
 **Padrão para "Array
(
)
"** _//Options_  
list of (   
object {  
**name** string _//The allowed keys (value format) are:
                                        discussionsubscribe (bool); subscribe to the discussion?, default to true
                                        private (bool); make this reply private to the author of the parent post, default to false.
                                        inlineattachmentsid              (int); the draft file area id for inline attachments
                                        attachmentsid       (int); the draft file area id for attachments
                                        topreferredformat (bool); convert the message & messageformat to FORMAT\_HTML, defaults to false_
                              
**value** string   _//the value of the option,
                                                            this param is validated in the external function._  
}   
)

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[options\] =>
    Array 
        (
        \[0\] =>
            Array 
                (
                \[name\] => string                
                \[value\] => string                
                )
        )

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
options\[0\]\[name\]= string
options\[0\]\[value\]= string

**messageformat** (Padrão para "1")  
        message format (1 = HTML, 0 = MOODLE, 2 = PLAIN, or 4 = MARKDOWN)  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int  **Padrão para "1"** _//message format (1 = HTML, 0 = MOODLE, 2 = PLAIN, or 4 = MARKDOWN)_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[messageformat\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
messageformat= int

  
  
Resposta  
**Estrutura geral**  
object {  
**postid** int   _//new post id_  
**warnings**  **Opcional** _//list of warnings_  
list of (   
  _//warning_  
object {  
**item** string  **Opcional** _//item_  
**itemid** int  **Opcional** _//item id_  
**warningcode** string   _//the warning code can be used by the client app to implement specific behaviour_  
**message** string   _//untranslated english message to explain the warning_  
}   
)**post** object {  
**id** int   _//id_  
**subject** string   _//subject_  
**replysubject** string   _//replysubject_  
**message** string   _//message_  
**messageformat** int   _//message format (1 = HTML, 0 = MOODLE, 2 = PLAIN, or 4 = MARKDOWN)_  
**author** object {  
**id** int  **Opcional** _//id_  
**fullname** string  **Opcional** _//fullname_  
**isdeleted** int  **Opcional** _//isdeleted_  
**groups**  **Opcional** _//groups_  
list of (   
object {  
**id** int   _//id_  
**name** string   _//name_  
**urls** object {  
**image** string  **Opcional** _//image_  
}   
}   
)**urls** object {  
**profile** string  **Opcional** _//The URL for the use profile page_  
**profileimage** string  **Opcional** _//The URL for the use profile image_  
}   
}   
**discussionid** int   _//discussionid_  
**hasparent** int   _//hasparent_  
**parentid** int  **Opcional** _//parentid_  
**timecreated** int   _//timecreated_  
**timemodified** int   _//timemodified_  
**unread** int  **Opcional** _//unread_  
**isdeleted** int   _//isdeleted_  
**isprivatereply** int   _//isprivatereply_  
**haswordcount** int   _//haswordcount_  
**wordcount** int  **Opcional** _//wordcount_  
**charcount** int  **Opcional** _//charcount_  
**capabilities** object {  
**view** int   _//Whether the user can view the post_  
**edit** int   _//Whether the user can edit the post_  
**delete** int   _//Whether the user can delete the post_  
**split** int   _//Whether the user can split the post_  
**reply** int   _//Whether the user can reply to the post_  
**selfenrol** int   _//Whether the user can self enrol into the course_  
**export** int   _//Whether the user can export the post_  
**controlreadstatus** int   _//Whether the user can control the read status of the post_  
**canreplyprivately** int   _//Whether the user can post a private reply_  
}   
**urls** object {  
**view** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to view the post_  
**viewisolated** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to view the post in isolation_  
**viewparent** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to view the parent of the post_  
**edit** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to edit the post_  
**delete** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to delete the post_  
**split** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to split the discussion with the selected post being the first post in the new discussion_  
**reply** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to reply to the post_  
**export** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to export the post_  
**markasread** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to mark the post as read_  
**markasunread** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to mark the post as unread_  
**discuss** string  **Opcional** _//discuss_  
}   
**attachments**   _//attachments_  
list of (   
object {  
**contextid** int   _//contextid_  
**component** string   _//component_  
**filearea** string   _//filearea_  
**itemid** int   _//itemid_  
**filepath** string   _//filepath_  
**filename** string   _//filename_  
**isdir** int   _//isdir_  
**isimage** int   _//isimage_  
**timemodified** int   _//timemodified_  
**timecreated** int   _//timecreated_  
**filesize** int   _//filesize_  
**author** string   _//author_  
**license** string   _//license_  
**filenameshort** string   _//filenameshort_  
**filesizeformatted** string   _//filesizeformatted_  
**icon** string   _//icon_  
**timecreatedformatted** string   _//timecreatedformatted_  
**timemodifiedformatted** string   _//timemodifiedformatted_  
**url** string   _//url_  
**urls** object {  
**export** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to export the attachment_  
}   
**html** object {  
**plagiarism** string  **Opcional** _//The HTML source for the Plagiarism Response_  
}   
}   
)**messageinlinefiles**  **Opcional** _//messageinlinefiles_

**mod\_forum\_can\_add\_discussion**  
  

Check if the current user can add discussions in the given forum (and optionally for the given group).

  
  
Argumentos  
**forumid** (Obrigatório)  
        Forum instance ID  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int   _//Forum instance ID_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[forumid\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
forumid= int

**groupid** (Padrão para "null")  
        The group to check, default to active group. Use -1 to check if the user can post in all the groups.  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int  **Padrão para "null"** _//The group to check, default to active group.
                                                Use -1 to check if the user can post in all the groups._  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[groupid\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
groupid= int

  
  
Resposta  
**Estrutura geral**  
object {  
**status** int   _//True if the user can add discussions, false otherwise._  
**canpindiscussions** int  **Opcional** _//True if the user can pin discussions, false otherwise._  
**cancreateattachment** int  **Opcional** _//True if the user can add attachments, false otherwise._  
**warnings**  **Opcional** _//list of warnings_  
list of (   
  _//warning_  
object {  
**item** string  **Opcional** _//item_  
**itemid** int  **Opcional** _//item id_  
**warningcode** string   _//the warning code can be used by the client app to implement specific behaviour_  
**message** string   _//untranslated english message to explain the warning_  
}   
)}   

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  

    Array 
        (
        \[status\] => int        
        \[canpindiscussions\] => int        
        \[cancreateattachment\] => int        
        \[warnings\] =>
            Array 
                (
                \[0\] =>
                    Array 
                        (
                        \[item\] => string                        
                        \[itemid\] => int                        
                        \[warningcode\] => string                        
                        \[message\] => string                        
                        )
                )        
        )

**REST**  
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<RESPONSE>
    <SINGLE>
        <KEY name="status">
            <VALUE>int</VALUE>
        </KEY>
        <KEY name="canpindiscussions">
            <VALUE>int</VALUE>
        </KEY>
        <KEY name="cancreateattachment">
            <VALUE>int</VALUE>
        </KEY>
        <KEY name="warnings">
            <MULTIPLE>
                <SINGLE>
                    <KEY name="item">
                        <VALUE>string</VALUE>
                    </KEY>
                    <KEY name="itemid">
                        <VALUE>int</VALUE>
                    </KEY>
                    <KEY name="warningcode">
                        <VALUE>string</VALUE>
                    </KEY>
                    <KEY name="message">
                        <VALUE>string</VALUE>
                    </KEY>
                </SINGLE>
            </MULTIPLE>
        </KEY>
    </SINGLE>
</RESPONSE>

**mod\_forum\_delete\_post**  
  

Deletes a post or a discussion completely when the post is the discussion topic.

  
  
Argumentos  
**postid** (Obrigatório)  
        Post to be deleted. It can be a discussion topic post.  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int   _//Post to be deleted. It can be a discussion topic post._  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[postid\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
postid= int

  
  
Resposta  
**Estrutura geral**

**status** int   _//True if the post/discussion was deleted, false otherwise._  
**warnings**  **Opcional** _//list of warnings_  
list of (   
  _//warning_  
object {  
**item** string  **Opcional** _//item_  
**itemid** int  **Opcional** _//item id_  
**warningcode** string   _//the warning code can be used by the client app to implement specific behaviour_  
**message** string   _//untranslated english message to explain the warning_  
}   
)}   

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  

    Array 
        (
        \[status\] => int        
        \[warnings\] =>
            Array 
                (
                \[0\] =>
                    Array

                        \[warningcode\] => string                        
                        \[message\] => string                        
                        )
                )        
        )

            <VALUE>int</VALUE>

**mod\_forum\_get\_discussion\_post**  
  

Get a particular discussion post.

  
  
Argumentos  
**postid** (Obrigatório)  
        Post to fetch.  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int   _//Post to fetch._  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[postid\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
postid= int

  
  
Resposta  
**Estrutura geral**  
object {  
**post** object {  
**id** int   _//id_  
**subject** string   _//subject_  
**replysubject** string   _//replysubject_  
**message** string   _//message_  
**messageformat** int   _//message format (1 = HTML, 0 = MOODLE, 2 = PLAIN, or 4 = MARKDOWN)_  
**author** object {  
**id** int  **Opcional** _//id_  
**fullname** string  **Opcional** _//fullname_  
**isdeleted** int  **Opcional** _//isdeleted_  
**groups**  **Opcional** _//groups_  
list of (   
object {  
**id** int   _//id_  
**name** string   _//name_  
**urls** object {  
**image** string  **Opcional** _//image_  
}   
}   
)**urls** object {  
**profile** string  **Opcional** _//The URL for the use profile page_  
**profileimage** string  **Opcional** _//The URL for the use profile image_  
}   
}   
**discussionid** int   _//discussionid_  
**hasparent** int   _//hasparent_  
**parentid** int  **Opcional** _//parentid_  
**timecreated** int   _//timecreated_  
**timemodified** int   _//timemodified_  
**unread** int  **Opcional** _//unread_  
**isdeleted** int   _//isdeleted_  
**isprivatereply** int   _//isprivatereply_  
**haswordcount** int   _//haswordcount_  
**wordcount** int  **Opcional** _//wordcount_  
**charcount** int  **Opcional** _//charcount_  
**capabilities** object {  
**view** int   _//Whether the user can view the post_  
**edit** int   _//Whether the user can edit the post_  
**delete** int   _//Whether the user can delete the post_  
**split** int   _//Whether the user can split the post_  
**reply** int   _//Whether the user can reply to the post_  
**selfenrol** int   _//Whether the user can self enrol into the course_  
**export** int   _//Whether the user can export the post_  
**controlreadstatus** int   _//Whether the user can control the read status of the post_  
**canreplyprivately** int   _//Whether the user can post a private reply_  
}   
**urls** object {  
**view** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to view the post_  
**viewisolated** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to view the post in isolation_  
**viewparent** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to view the parent of the post_  
**edit** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to edit the post_  
**delete** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to delete the post_  
**split** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to split the discussion with the selected post being the first post in the new discussion_  
**reply** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to reply to the post_  
**export** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to export the post_  
**markasread** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to mark the post as read_  
**markasunread** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to mark the post as unread_  
**discuss** string  **Opcional** _//discuss_  
}   
**attachments**   _//attachments_  
list of (   
object {  
**contextid** int   _//contextid_  
**component** string   _//component_  
**filearea** string   _//filearea_  
**itemid** int   _//itemid_  
**filepath** string   _//filepath_  
**filename** string   _//filename_  
**isdir** int   _//isdir_  
**isimage** int   _//isimage_  
**timemodified** int   _//timemodified_  
**timecreated** int   _//timecreated_  
**filesize** int   _//filesize_  
**author** string   _//author_  
**license** string   _//license_  
**filenameshort** string   _//filenameshort_  
**filesizeformatted** string   _//filesizeformatted_  
**icon** string   _//icon_  
**timecreatedformatted** string   _//timecreatedformatted_  
**timemodifiedformatted** string   _//timemodifiedformatted_  
**url** string   _//url_  
**urls** object {  
**export** string  **Opcional** _//The URL used to export the attachment_  
}   
**html** object {  
**plagiarism** string  **Opcional** _//The HTML source for the Plagiarism Response_  
}   
}   
)**messageinlinefiles**  **Opcional** _//messageinlinefiles_  
list of (   
object {  
**contextid** int   _//contextid_  
**component** string   _//component_  
**filearea** string   _//filearea_  
**itemid** int   _//itemid_  
**filepath** string   _//filepath_  
**filename** string   _//filename_

**timecreatedformatted** string   _//timecreatedformatted_  
**timemodifiedformatted** string   _//timemodifiedformatted_  
**url** string   _//url_  
}   
)**tags**  **Opcional** _//tags_  
list of (   
object {  
**id** int   _//The ID of the Tag_  
**tagid** int   _//The tagid_  
**isstandard** int   _//Whether this is a standard tag_

**flag** int   _//Wehther this tag is flagged_  
**urls** object {  
**view** string   _//The URL to view the tag_  
}   
}   
)**html** object {

**taglist** string  **Opcional** _//The HTML source to view the list of tags_  
**authorsubheading** string  **Opcional** _//The HTML source to view the author details_  
}   
}   
**warnings**  **Opcional** _//list of warnings_  
list of (   
  _//warning_  
object {  
**item** string  **Opcional** _//item_  
**itemid** int  **Opcional** _//item id_

**message** string   _//untranslated english message to explain the warning_  
}   
)}

Restrito a usuários logados  
Sim  
  
Pode ser chamado do AJAX  
Não  
  
**mod\_forum\_get\_discussion\_posts**  
  

Returns a list of forum posts for a discussion.

  
  
Argumentos  
**discussionid** (Obrigatório)  
        The ID of the discussion from which to fetch posts.  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int   _//The ID of the discussion from which to fetch posts._  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[discussionid\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
discussionid= int

**sortby** (Padrão para "created")  
        Sort by this element: id, created or modified  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
string  **Padrão para "created"** _//Sort by this element: id, created or modified_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[sortby\] => string

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
sortby= string

**sortdirection** (Padrão para "DESC")  
        Sort direction: ASC or DESC  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
string  **Padrão para "DESC"** _//Sort direction: ASC or DESC_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[sortdirection\] => string

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
sortdirection= string

**includeinlineattachments** (Padrão para "")  
        Whether inline attachments should be included or not  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int  **Padrão para ""** _//Whether inline attachments should be included or not_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[includeinlineattachments\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
includeinlineattachments= int

object {

**component** string   _//Context name._  
**ratingarea** string   _//Rating area name._  
**canviewall** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user can view all the individual ratings._  
**canviewany** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user can view aggregate of ratings of others._  
**scales**  **Opcional** _//Different scales used information_  
list of (   
  _//Scale information_  
object {  
**id** int   _//Scale id._

**name** string  **Opcional** _//Scale name (when a real scale is used)._

**items**  **Opcional** _//Scale items. Only returned for not numerical scales._

object {

}   
)}   
)**ratings**  **Opcional** _//The ratings_

**aggregatelabel** string  **Opcional** _//The aggregation label._  
**count** int  **Opcional** _//Ratings count (used when aggregating)._  
**rating** int  **Opcional** _//The rating the user gave._  
**canrate** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user can rate the item._  
**canviewaggregate** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user can view the aggregated grade._  
}   
)}   
**warnings**  **Opcional** _//list of warnings_  
list of (   
  _//warning_  
object {  
**item** string  **Opcional** _//item_  
**itemid** int  **Opcional** _//item id_  
**warningcode** string   _//the warning code can be used by the client app to implement specific behaviour_  
**message** string   _//untranslated english message to explain the warning_  
}   
)}

Restrito a usuários logados  
Sim  
  
Pode ser chamado do AJAX  
Sim  
  
**mod\_forum\_get\_discussion\_posts\_by\_userid**  
  

Returns a list of forum posts for a discussion for a user.

  
  
Argumentos  
**userid** (Obrigatório)  
        The ID of the user of whom to fetch posts.  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int   _//The ID of the user of whom to fetch posts._  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[userid\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
userid= int

**cmid** (Obrigatório)  
        The ID of the module of which to fetch items.  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int   _//The ID of the module of which to fetch items._  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[cmid\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
cmid= int

**sortby** (Padrão para "created")  
        Sort by this element: id, created or modified  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
string  **Padrão para "created"** _//Sort by this element: id, created or modified_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[sortby\] => string

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
sortby= string

**sortdirection** (Padrão para "DESC")  
        Sort direction: ASC or DESC  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
string  **Padrão para "DESC"** _//Sort direction: ASC or DESC_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[sortdirection\] => string

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
sortdirection= string

**itemid** int  **Opcional** _//item id_  
**warningcode** string   _//the warning code can be used by the client app to implement specific behaviour_  
**message** string   _//untranslated english message to explain the warning_  
}   
)}

**mod\_forum\_get\_forum\_access\_information**  
  

Return capabilities information for a given forum.

  
  
Argumentos  
**forumid** (Obrigatório)  
        Forum instance id.  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int   _//Forum instance id._  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[forumid\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
forumid= int

  
  
Resposta  
**Estrutura geral**  
object {  
**warnings**  **Opcional** _//list of warnings_  
list of (   
  _//warning_  
object {  
**item** string  **Opcional** _//item_  
**itemid** int  **Opcional** _//item id_  
**warningcode** string   _//the warning code can be used by the client app to implement specific behaviour_  
**message** string   _//untranslated english message to explain the warning_  
}   
)**canaddinstance** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:addinstance allowed._  
**canviewdiscussion** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:viewdiscussion allowed._  
**canviewhiddentimedposts** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:viewhiddentimedposts allowed._  
**canstartdiscussion** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:startdiscussion allowed._  
**canreplypost** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:replypost allowed._  
**canaddnews** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:addnews allowed._  
**canreplynews** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:replynews allowed._  
**canviewrating** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:viewrating allowed._  
**canviewanyrating** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:viewanyrating allowed._  
**canviewallratings** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:viewallratings allowed._  
**canrate** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:rate allowed._  
**canpostprivatereply** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:postprivatereply allowed._  
**canreadprivatereplies** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:readprivatereplies allowed._  
**cancreateattachment** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:createattachment allowed._  
**candeleteownpost** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:deleteownpost allowed._  
**candeleteanypost** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:deleteanypost allowed._  
**cansplitdiscussions** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:splitdiscussions allowed._  
**canmovediscussions** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:movediscussions allowed._  
**canpindiscussions** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:pindiscussions allowed._  
**caneditanypost** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:editanypost allowed._  
**canviewqandawithoutposting** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:viewqandawithoutposting allowed._  
**canviewsubscribers** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:viewsubscribers allowed._  
**canmanagesubscriptions** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:managesubscriptions allowed._  
**canpostwithoutthrottling** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:postwithoutthrottling allowed._  
**canexportdiscussion** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:exportdiscussion allowed._  
**canexportforum** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:exportforum allowed._  
**canexportpost** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:exportpost allowed._  
**canexportownpost** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:exportownpost allowed._  
**canaddquestion** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:addquestion allowed._  
**canallowforcesubscribe** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:allowforcesubscribe allowed._  
**cancanposttomygroups** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:canposttomygroups allowed._  
**cancanoverridediscussionlock** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:canoverridediscussionlock allowed._  
**cancanoverridecutoff** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:canoverridecutoff allowed._  
**cancantogglefavourite** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:cantogglefavourite allowed._  
**cangrade** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:grade allowed._  
**cancanmailnow** int  **Opcional** _//Whether the user has the capability mod/forum:canmailnow allowed._  
}

    Array 
        (
        \[warnings\] =>
            Array 
                (

**mod\_forum\_get\_forum\_discussions**  
  

Returns a list of forum discussions optionally sorted and paginated.

  
  
Argumentos  
**forumid** (Obrigatório)  
        forum instance id  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int   _//forum instance id_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[forumid\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
forumid= int

**sortorder** (Padrão para "-1")  
        sort by this element: numreplies, , created or timemodified  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int  **Padrão para "-1"** _//sort by this element: numreplies, , created or timemodified_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[sortorder\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
sortorder= int

**page** (Padrão para "-1")  
        current page  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int  **Padrão para "-1"** _//current page_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[page\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
page= int

**perpage** (Padrão para "0")  
        items per page  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int  **Padrão para "0"** _//items per page_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[perpage\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
perpage= int

**groupid** (Padrão para "0")  
        group id  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int  **Padrão para "0"** _//group id_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[groupid\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
groupid= int

  
  
Resposta  
**Estrutura geral**  
object {  
**discussions** list of (   
  _//post_  
object {  
**id** int   _//Post id_  
**name** string   _//Discussion name_  
**groupid** int   _//Group id_  
**timemodified** int   _//Time modified_  
**usermodified** int   _//The id of the user who last modified_  
**timestart** int   _//Time discussion can start_  
**timeend** int   _//Time discussion ends_  
**discussion** int   _//Discussion id_  
**parent** int   _//Parent id_  
**userid** int   _//User who started the discussion id_  
**created** int   _//Creation time_  
**modified** int   _//Time modified_  
**mailed** int   _//Mailed?_  
**subject** string   _//The post subject_  
**message** string   _//The post message_  
**messageformat** int   _//message format (1 = HTML, 0 = MOODLE, 2 = PLAIN, or 4 = MARKDOWN)_  
**messagetrust** int   _//Can we trust?_  
**messageinlinefiles**  **Opcional** _//post message inline files_  
list of (   
  _//File._  
object {  
**filename** string  **Opcional** _//File name._  
**filepath** string  **Opcional** _//File path._  
**filesize** int  **Opcional** _//File size._  
**fileurl** string  **Opcional** _//Downloadable file url._  
**timemodified** int  **Opcional** _//Time modified._  
**mimetype** string  **Opcional** _//File mime type._  
**isexternalfile** int  **Opcional** _//Whether is an external file._  
**repositorytype** string  **Opcional** _//The repository type for external files._  
}   
)**attachment** string   _//Has attachments?_  
**attachments**  **Opcional** _//attachments_  
list of (   
  _//File._  
object {  
**filename** string  **Opcional** _//File name._  
**filepath** string  **Opcional** _//File path._  
**filesize** int  **Opcional** _//File size._  
**fileurl** string  **Opcional** _//Downloadable file url._  
**timemodified** int  **Opcional** _//Time modified._  
**mimetype** string  **Opcional** _//File mime type._  
**isexternalfile** int  **Opcional** _//Whether is an external file._  
**repositorytype** string  **Opcional** _//The repository type for external files._  
}   
)**totalscore** int   _//The post message total score_  
**mailnow** int   _//Mail now?_  
**userfullname** string   _//Post author full name_  
**usermodifiedfullname** string   _//Post modifier full name_  
**userpictureurl** string   _//Post author picture._  
**usermodifiedpictureurl** string   _//Post modifier picture._  
**numreplies** int   _//The number of replies in the discussion_  
**numunread** int   _//The number of unread discussions._  
**pinned** int   _//Is the discussion pinned_  
**locked** int   _//Is the discussion locked_  
**starred** int   _//Is the discussion starred_  
**canreply** int   _//Can the user reply to the discussion_  
**canlock** int   _//Can the user lock the discussion_  
**canfavourite** int   _//Can the user star the discussion_  
}   
)**warnings**  **Opcional** _//list of warnings_

**mod\_forum\_get\_forum\_discussions\_paginated** Descontinuado  
  

\*\* DEPRECATED \*\* Please do not call this function any more. Returns a list of forum discussions optionally sorted and paginated.

  
  
Argumentos  
**forumid** (Obrigatório)  
        forum instance id  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int   _//forum instance id_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[forumid\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
forumid= int

**sortby** (Padrão para "timemodified")  
        sort by this element: id, timemodified, timestart or timeend  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
string  **Padrão para "timemodified"** _//sort by this element: id, timemodified, timestart or timeend_

string  **Padrão para "DESC"** _//sort direction: ASC or DESC_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**

**mod\_forum\_get\_forums\_by\_courses**  
  

Returns a list of forum instances in a provided set of courses, if no courses are provided then all the forum instances the user has access to will be returned.

  
  
Argumentos  
**courseids** (Padrão para "Array ( ) ")  
        Array of Course IDs  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
 **Padrão para "Array
(
)
"** _//Array of Course IDs_  
list of (   
int   _//course ID_  
)

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[courseids\] =>
    Array 
        (
        \[0\] => int
        )

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
courseids\[0\]= int

  _//forum_  
object {  
**id** int   _//Forum id_  
**course** int   _//Course id_  
**type** string   _//The forum type_  
**name** string   _//Forum name_

**introformat** int   _//intro format (1 = HTML, 0 = MOODLE, 2 = PLAIN, or 4 = MARKDOWN)_  
**introfiles**  **Opcional** _//Files in the introduction text_  
list of (   
  _//File._

)**lang** string  **Opcional** _//Forced activity language_

**scale** int   _//Scale_  
**grade\_forum** int   _//Whole forum grade_  
**grade\_forum\_notify** int   _//Whether to send notifications to students upon grading by default_  
**maxbytes** int   _//Maximum attachment size_  
**maxattachments** int   _//Maximum number of attachments_  
**forcesubscribe** int   _//Force users to subscribe_

**istracked** int  **Opcional** _//If the user is tracking the forum_

}   
)

**mod\_forum\_prepare\_draft\_area\_for\_post**  
  

Prepares a draft area for editing a post.

  
  
Argumentos  
**postid** (Obrigatório)  
        Post to prepare the draft area for.  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int   _//Post to prepare the draft area for._  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[postid\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
postid= int

**area** (Obrigatório)  
        Area to prepare: attachment or post.  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
string   _//Area to prepare: attachment or post._  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[area\] => string

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
area= string

**draftitemid** (Padrão para "0")  
        The draft item id to use. 0 to generate one.  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int  **Padrão para "0"** _//The draft item id to use. 0 to generate one._  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[draftitemid\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
draftitemid= int

**filestokeep** (Padrão para "Array ( ) ")  
        Only keep these files in the draft file area. Empty for keeping all.  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
 **Padrão para "Array
(
)
"** _//Only keep these files in the draft file area. Empty for keeping all._  
list of (   
object {  
**filename** string   _//File name._  
**filepath** string   _//File path._  
}   
)

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[filestokeep\] =>
    Array 
        (
        \[0\] =>
            Array 
                (
                \[filename\] => string                
                \[filepath\] => string                
                )
        )

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
filestokeep\[0\]\[filename\]= string
filestokeep\[0\]\[filepath\]= string

  
  
Resposta  
**Estrutura geral**  
object {  
**draftitemid** int   _//Draft item id for the file area._  
**files**  **Opcional** _//Draft area files._  
list of (   
  _//File._  
object {  
**filename** string  **Opcional** _//File name._  
**filepath** string  **Opcional** _//File path._  
**filesize** int  **Opcional** _//File size._  
**fileurl** string  **Opcional** _//Downloadable file url._  
**timemodified** int  **Opcional** _//Time modified._  
**mimetype** string  **Opcional** _//File mime type._  
**isexternalfile** int  **Opcional** _//Whether is an external file._  
**repositorytype** string  **Opcional** _//The repository type for external files._  
}   
)**areaoptions**   _//Draft file area options._  
list of (   
object {  
**name** string   _//Name of option._  
**value** string   _//Value of option._  
}   
)**messagetext** string   _//Message text with URLs rewritten._  
**warnings**  **Opcional** _//list of warnings_  
list of (   
  _//warning_  
object {  
**item** string  **Opcional** _//item_  
**itemid** int  **Opcional** _//item id_  
**warningcode** string   _//the warning code can be used by the client app to implement specific behaviour_  
**message** string   _//untranslated english message to explain the warning_  
}   
)}   

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  

    Array 
        (
        \[draftitemid\] => int        
        \[files\] =>
            Array 
                (
                \[0\] =>
                    Array 
                        (
                        \[filename\] => string                        
                        \[filepath\] => string                        
                        \[filesize\] => int                        
                        \[fileurl\] => string                        
                        \[timemodified\] => int

                        \[repositorytype\] => string                        
                        )
                )

            Array

                    Array 
                        (
                        \[name\] => string                        
                        \[value\] => string                        
                        )
                )        
        \[messagetext\] => string        
        \[warnings\] =>
            Array 
                (
                \[0\] =>
                    Array 
                        (
                        \[item\] => string                        
                        \[itemid\] => int                        
                        \[warningcode\] => string                        
                        \[message\] => string                        
                        )
                )        
        )

**mod\_forum\_update\_discussion\_post**  
  

Updates a post or a discussion topic post.

  
  
Argumentos  
**postid** (Obrigatório)  
        Post to be updated. It can be a discussion topic post.  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int   _//Post to be updated. It can be a discussion topic post._  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[postid\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
postid= int

**subject** (Padrão para "")  
        Updated post subject  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
string  **Padrão para ""** _//Updated post subject_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[subject\] => string

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
subject= string

**message** (Padrão para "")  
        Updated post message (HTML assumed if messageformat is not provided)  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
string  **Padrão para ""** _//Updated post message (HTML assumed if messageformat is not provided)_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[message\] => string

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
message= string

**messageformat** (Padrão para "1")  
        message format (1 = HTML, 0 = MOODLE, 2 = PLAIN, or 4 = MARKDOWN)  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
int  **Padrão para "1"** _//message format (1 = HTML, 0 = MOODLE, 2 = PLAIN, or 4 = MARKDOWN)_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[messageformat\] => int

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
messageformat= int

**options** (Padrão para "Array ( ) ")  
        Configuration options for the post.  
  

**Estrutura geral**  
 **Padrão para "Array
(
)
"** _//Configuration options for the post._  
list of (   
object {  
**name** string   _//The allowed keys (value format) are:
                                pinned (bool); (only for discussions) whether to pin this discussion or not
                                discussionsubscribe (bool); whether to subscribe to the post or not
                                inlineattachmentsid (int); the draft file area id for inline attachments in the text
                                attachmentsid (int); the draft file area id for attachments_  
**value** string   _//The value of the option._  
}   
)

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[options\] =>
    Array 
        (
        \[0\] =>
            Array 
                (
                \[name\] => string                
                \[value\] => string                
                )
        )

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
options\[0\]\[name\]= string
options\[0\]\[value\]= string

  
  
Resposta  
**Estrutura geral**  
object {  
**status** int   _//True if the post/discussion was updated, false otherwise._  
**warnings**  **Opcional** _//list of warnings_  
list of (   
  _//warning_  
object {  
**item** string  **Opcional** _//item_  
**itemid** int  **Opcional** _//item id_  
**warningcode** string   _//the warning code can be used by the client app to implement specific behaviour_  
**message** string   _//untranslated english message to explain the warning_  
}   
)}   

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  

    Array 
        (
        \[status\] => int        
        \[warnings\] =>
            Array 
                (
                \[0\] =>
                    Array 
                        (
                        \[item\] => string                        
                        \[itemid\] => int                        
                        \[warningcode\] => string                        
                        \[message\] => string                        
                        )
                )        
        )

**REST**  
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<RESPONSE>
    <SINGLE>
        <KEY name="status">
            <VALUE>int</VALUE>
        </KEY>
        <KEY name="warnings">
            <MULTIPLE>
                <SINGLE>
                    <KEY name="item">
                        <VALUE>string</VALUE>
                    </KEY>
                    <KEY name="itemid">
                        <VALUE>int</VALUE>
                    </KEY>
                    <KEY name="warningcode">
                        <VALUE>string</VALUE>
                    </KEY>
                    <KEY name="message">
                        <VALUE>string</VALUE>
                    </KEY>
                </SINGLE>
            </MULTIPLE>
        </KEY>
    </SINGLE>
</RESPONSE>

**Estrutura geral**  
int   _//Glossary id_

**Estrutura geral**  
string   _//Glossary concept_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[concept\] => string

**REST (parâmetros POST)**  
concept= string

**definition** (Obrigatório)

string   _//Glossary concept definition_  

**XML-RPC (Estrutura PHP)**  
\[definition\] => string

        definition format (1 = HTML, 0 = MOODLE, 2 = PLAIN, or 4 = MARKDOWN)

                            inlineattachmentsid (int); the draft file area id for inline attachments
                            attachmentsid (int); the draft file area id for attachments
                            categories (comma separated int); comma separated category ids
                            aliases (comma separated str); comma separated aliases
                            usedynalink (bool); whether the entry should be automatically linked.
                            casesensitive (bool); whether the entry is case sensitive.
                            fullmatch (bool); whether to match whole words only._

}   
)
